SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS ERIK FENG AND ANNETTE FELTON ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRANDON BAKHTIAR IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
